description:
Recto: Letter in Arabic script. Fragment (upper half only). The addressee is greeted as ḥaḍrat mawlāya al-raʾīs al-jalīl. The sender reports that Abū l-Ḥusayn told him that he and his son took the ruqʿa (petition?) to the Kurds 'who opposed them' but did not reach them. The addressee and ʿUddat al-Dawla are asked to help in some way. 
Verso: Letter in Arabic script. Asking for a loan of 20 dinars "for an important matter." The margins are filled with undeciphered jottings in Arabic script in a smaller hand. AA. ASE.
